def positive_background_job_depends_on_request_context_object():
    rule_id = "background_job_depends_on_request_context_object"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Celery, RQ, or background task function holds a reference to an HTTP request context object across the task boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
